jobs.title: PRADA Outlet Sales Assistant (m/f/d) 32h Parttime

titleByLocale.fr: PRADA Outlet Sales Assistant (m/f/d) 32h Temps partiel

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities.

 
 

 
 

 
 
 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Sales Associate (m/f/d) with 32h/week to join our dynamic team in our Prada Outlet in Roermond. As a Client Advisor (m/f/d), you will represent the Company towards customers and achieve the quantitative and qualitative objectives for the Department and the Store.

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Manage sales and optimize each step of the sales process.
 
 Understand the customer’s needs, both expressed and hidden.
 
 Present and value the product range.
 
 Boost cross-selling and additional sales.
 
 Ensure the correct management (cleaning, care, replacement) of the products in the department.
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 Passion for human relations and sales

 
 Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion, art and design

 
 Experience of building a long-lasting relationship with clients

 
 Being able to work in team as well as alone

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

 
 Passion and knowledge of the managed product category

 
 Fluent spoken English expected

 
 
 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth.
Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 Key Responsibilities 

 
 

 
 
 Inspire, drive, coach and support store teams in developing a client-oriented mindset, ensuring a proper understanding and constant execution of all clienteling activities for store teams
 
 Leverage on client and market analysis to set stores clienteling objectives, drive Private Appointment, Outreach, Prospect, support Store Managers to deep dive on client profiling with CA to target for events to achieved business results.
 
 To support client acquisition & retention, also leveraging on local market opportunities.
 
 Relationship with landlord, third-party, personal network for client development
 
 Identify and develop existing and new clients (prospects) to become future VICs
 
 Support store team on client’s personalized outreach and event invitation contents
 
 Support CRM Manager on clienteling processes, ensuring proper implementation and consistency of approach, supervise and promote the correct use of all Clienteling tools in stores.
 
 Support CRM Manager on Client Experience activities for local VIC, and offer highest level of experience in-store.
 
 Collecting CRM needs and sharing best practices.
 
 
 

 
 Job Competencies 

 
 

 
 
 Team working and organizational capabilities.
 
 Business development approach and clienteling mindset and curiosity.
 
 Results Orientation.
 
 Coaching capabilities and good communication skills
 
 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 Responsibilities: 

 
 
 
 Ensures the safety of the products and the valuable material in the warehouse.

 

 
 
 Ensures that the goods in are entered in to the IT system.

 

 
 
 Positions the products on the sales floor.

 

 
 
 Always maintains order in the warehouse.

 

 
 
 Prepares the goods for repairs.

 

 
 
 Registers the goods that need repairing in the IT system.

 

 
 
 Dispatches the goods to clients/factories/other stores or warehouses.

 

 
 
 Requirements: 
 

 
 
 
 Form 5 or above;

 

 
 
 1-2 year(s) of relevant experience;

jobs.title: CHURCH'S Senior Client Advisor Regent Street

titleByLocale.en: CHURCH'S Senior Client Advisor Regent Street
titleByLocale.it: CHURCH'S Senior Client Consulente Regent Street
titleByLocale.de: CHURCH'S Senior Client Berater Regent Street
titleByLocale.fr: CHURCH'S Senior Client Conseiller Regent Street

jobs.description:
Church’s is a luxury shoemaker of rich innovation and traditional excellence, anchored in an exceptional heritage of English craftsmanship. Established in Northampton in 1873, the brand’s expertise quickly earned recognition from its modest beginnings – from a small workshop in Northampton to global expansion. Its patronage was bestowed by HM Queen Elizabeth II in 1965. In 1999, the luxury house was acquired by Prada Group, a paradigm of artisanal excellence in its own right and the ideal ally to help the shoemaker take its brand to the next chapter. Reinventing the English roots and championing timeless craftsmanship and traditions: Church’s long-established innovation and authenticity remains paramount with unique designs across shoes and accessories for men and for women. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 To be the “ambassador” who convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world of the Brands. As such, to be responsible to maximize the individual and team sales, providing an extraordinary and memorable luxury customer experience placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships and developing their Brand loyalty. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Place the Customer at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”. 
 
 Capture Customer data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities. 
 
 Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset. 
 
 Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure a consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and inclusion values. 
 
 
 
 Welcome and serve the customer providing an excellent in-store experience at all times. 
 
 Be proactively engaged in cross selling with all Departments and maximizes sales opportunity in order to achieve individual sales target and KPIs. 
 
 Ensure to be up-to-date knowing fashion trends and competitors. 
 
 Prove Brand and product knowledge. 
 
 Deal effectively with customer complaints by liaising with the line manager when necessary. 
 
 Ensure and maintain the shop floor and visual display high standard, complying with Company operational guidelines and stock procedures. 
 
 Contribute to ensure a high level of security and is attentive to prevent product thefts. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Passion for selling and stores 

 
 Curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion, art and design 

 
 Experience of building a long-lasting relationship with clients 

 
 Being able to work in team as well as alone 

 
 Excellent communication and interpersonal skills 

 
 Ambition, resilience, self motivation, result driven and problem solving 

 
 Passion and knowledge of the managed product category 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: PRADA Department Manager
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 To be a Company Brand Ambassador and to be responsible to achieve all the qualitative and quantitative objectives of the product category department assigned. To manage and to motivate the department team in achieving the sales target, ensuring extraordinary Client service experience, being present on the sales floor, managing the activities of the department. 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 BUSINESS 

 
 
 Ensure an exceptional welcome and customer service, fostering cross selling among the product categories. 
 
 Analyze the department performance and define the act ı ons required for ach ı eving the bus ı ness object ı ves. 
 
 Give commercial suggestions to SM. 
 
 Drive the team to exceed their KPIs. 
 
 Be constantly up-to-date on market trend and share ı ns ı ghts w ı th relevant funct ı ons. 
 
 Foster the ecommerce channel development.

 Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction through excellent service. 
 
 Strengthen customer loyalty by engag ı ng and supporting the sales team ı n clientel ı ng act ı v ı ties and gains new local customers to grow department sales. 
 
 
 

 
 TEAM 

 
 
 Train and inspire the sales staff of her/his department in product knowledge, sales techniques, customer services and company procedures. 
 
 Identify h ı gh potent ı al collaborators for internal development opportunities. 
 
 Ensure effective communication and encourage information sharing and development of ad hoc morning briefing. 
 
 
 

 
 RETAIL 

 
 
 Guarantee an in-depth product knowledge w ı th ı n the department, working w ı th the relevant functions to support product/ collection training needs. 
 
 Prov ı de feedback and focused suggestions on department needs to the Store Manager. 
 
 Guarantee the v ı sual presentat ı on of his/her department. 
 
 Ensure effect ı ve and eff ı c ı ent back-of-house organization for the department and is responsible for the protect ı on of the company’s assets as well as the staff grooming standards to be ensured. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 Passion and knowledge of the managed product category 

 
 Business driven 

 
 Team player with the ability to lead and influence peers 

 
 Strong customer service approach 

 
 Natural ability to serve our client 

 
 Confident, enthusiastic and positive 

 
 Problem solving 

 
 Organized and detail oriented 

 
 Market and product knowledge/passion 

 
 Business/Retail Management degree or equivalent is a plus

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 Leading the Business 

 
 
 Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store 
 
 Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance 
 
 Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories 

 
 
 
 Client Development 

 
 
 Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request 
 
 Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences 
 
 Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” 
 
 
 

 
 Team Management 

 
 
 Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client 
 
 Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics 
 
 Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates 
 
 Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures 
 
 
 

 
 Boutique Care 

 
 
 Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure 
 
 Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs 
 
 Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 
 

 
 At least 8 years of experience 

 
 Strong problem-solving and organizational skills 

 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions 

 
 Excellent communication skills and team spirit 

 
 Fluency in both Italian and English 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Fondata nel 1913 in Italia, il Gruppo Prada è stato costruito su una tradizione di eccellenza e con una visione di innovazione. Il Gruppo, leader mondiale nel settore del lusso, opera in più di 45 paesi con i marchi PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe e Luna Rossa, e ha dipendenti di oltre 100 nazionalità. ## Mansioni ## Brand Store Manager Come Brand Store Manager, sei un ambasciatore appassionato del marchio e un leader aziendale, che trasmette la filosofia e i valori del marchio al mercato locale, al team del negozio e al cliente finale. ## Responsabilità - Leading the Business - Guidare il team del negozio a superare gli obiettivi finanziari e massimizzare le prestazioni di vendita, determinando il successo dell'intero negozio - Proporre e sviluppare piani d'azione, attraverso un'attenta analisi delle prestazioni - Guidare il team del negozio a superare i loro obiettivi KPI, inclusa la vendita incrociata e la vendita di prodotti tra categorie - Client Development - Mettere il cliente al di sopra di tutto, guidando con l'esempio per creare un ambiente accogliente e garantire che il team si impegni a soddisfare ogni esigenza e richiesta del cliente - descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Gegründet 1913 in Italien, wurde die Prada Group auf einer Tradition von Exzellenz und mit einer Vision von Innovation aufgebaut. Die Gruppe, ein weltweiter Marktführer im Luxussegment, operiert in mehr als 45 Ländern mit den Marken PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe und Luna Rossa und beschäftigt Mitarbeiter aus über 100 Nationalitäten. ## Aufgaben ## Brand Store Manager Als Brand Store Manager sind Sie ein leidenschaftlicher Markenbotschafter und ein Unternehmensführer, der die Philosophie und die Werte der Marke an den lokalen Markt, das Store-Team und den Endkunden übermittelt. ## Verantwortlichkeiten - Leading the Business - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, die finanziellen Ziele zu übertreffen und die Verkaufsleistungen zu maximieren, um den Erfolg des gesamten Stores zu bestimmen - Aktionspläne vorschlagen und entwickeln, durch sorgfältige Analyse der Leistungen - Das Store-Team dazu bringen, ihre KPI-Ziele zu übertreffen, einschließlich Cross-Selling und Upselling zwischen Produktkategorien - Client Development - Den Kunden über alles stellen, indem Sie mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um eine einladende Umgebung zu schaffen und sicherzustellen, dass das Team sich bemüht, jede Notwendigkeit und Anfrage des Kunden zu erfüllen - Eine klientenzentrierte Denkweise fördern, indem Sie solide Kundenbeziehungen aufbauen und aufrechterhalten und sinnvolle Nachverkaufserfahrungen durchsetzen - Eine ausgezeichnete Kundenzufriedenheit und den höchsten Level an Kundenservice durch die Ausführung der "Markenverkaufszermonie" gewährleisten - Team Management - Als starker Mitarbeiter motivator fungieren, indem Sie Teamspirit durch effektive Kommunikation fördern und eine positive und energetische Umgebung schaffen, auch für die Kunden - Den Informationsaustausch innerhalb des Teams fördern und proaktiv Morgenbriefings zu spezifischen Themen entwickeln - Alle Unternehmenswerkzeuge und -anwendungen, einschließlich IT und digital, beherrschen und sicherstellen, dass das Team ständig über relevante Updates informiert ist - Die Bedürfnisse und Prioritäten verstehen, das Store-Team in Produktkenntnissen, Verkaufstechniken, Kundenservice und Unternehmensrichtlinien und -verfahren schulen und inspirieren - Boutique Care - Mit gutem Beispiel vorangehen, um sicherzustellen, dass das Team mit dem höchsten Level an Sorgfalt und Respekt für das Produkt arbeitet, offensichtlich in jeder Zeremonie oder Prozedur - Sicherstellen, dass die Schaufensterdekoration Kunden anzieht und den Verkauf maximiert, in Übereinstimmung mit Unternehmensrichtlinien - proaktiv VM- und MD-Unterstützung basierend auf den Bedürfnissen des Stores suchen - Feedback und Vorschläge geben, wenn notwendig, an die Abteilungen Visual Merchandising und Retail Merchandising ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 8 Jahre Erfahrung - Starke Problemlösungs- und Organisationsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten und über Funktionen hinweg zu koordinieren - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Teamspirit - Fließend in beiden Sprachen, Italienisch und Englisch ## Was bieten wir Der Beitritt zu unserem Unternehmen bedeutet, in einer kreativen und internationalen Umgebung zu arbeiten, mit Teams von Menschen, die durch Neugier und die Suche nach Exzellenz motiviert sind. Der Motor unseres Erfolgs ist die Bedeutung und der Wert, den wir auf das Talent und die Leidenschaft unserer Mitarbeiter legen, was zu ihrem eigenen beruflichen Wachstum führt. Die Prada Group fördert eine inklusive Arbeitsumgebung, die gleiche Chancen für alle Kandidaten gewährleistet, unabhängig von Geschlecht, Ethnizität, sexueller Orientierung, Behinderung oder anderen persönlichen Merkmalen. Wir glauben, dass Vielfalt ein Wert ist und verpflichten uns, einen fairen und respektvollen Arbeitsplatz für alle zu schaffen. ## Kontakt
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Fondée en 1913 en Italie, le Groupe Prada a été construit sur une tradition d'excellence et avec une vision de l'innovation. Le Groupe, un leader mondial dans le secteur du luxe, opère dans plus de 45 pays avec les marques PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church's, Car Shoe et Luna Rossa, et compte des employés de plus de 100 nationalités. ## Missions ## Brand Store Manager En tant que Brand Store Manager, vous êtes un ambassadeur passionné de la marque et un leader d'entreprise, qui transmet la philosophie et les valeurs de la marque au marché local, à l'équipe du magasin et au client final. ## Responsabilités - Leading the Business - Diriger l'équipe du magasin pour dépasser les objectifs financiers et maximiser les performances de vente, en déterminant le succès de l'ensemble du magasin - Proposer et développer des plans d'action, à travers une analyse minutieuse des performances - Diriger l'équipe du magasin pour dépasser leurs objectifs KPI, y compris la vente croisée et la vente de produits entre catégories - Client Development - Placer le client au-dessus de tout, en donnant l'exemple pour créer un environnement accueillant et pour garantir que l'équipe s'efforce de répondre à chaque besoin et demande du client - Favoriser une mentalité centrée sur le client, en développant et en maintenant des relations solides avec les clients et en garantissant des expériences de vente significatives après-vente - Garantir une excellente satisfaction client et le plus haut niveau de service client à travers l'exécution de la "Cérémonie de vente de la marque" - Team Management - Agir en tant que motivateur fort du personnel, en promouvant l'esprit d'équipe à travers une communication efficace et en créant un environnement positif et énergétique, même aux yeux du client - Encourager l'échange d'informations au sein de l'équipe et développer de manière proactive des briefings matinaux sur des sujets spécifiques - Maîtriser tous les outils et applications de l'entreprise, y compris IT et numériques, et garantir que l'équipe est constamment informée des mises à jour pertinentes - Comprendre les besoins et les priorités, former et inspirer l'équipe du magasin sur la connaissance du produit, les techniques de vente, les services client et les politiques et procédures de l'entreprise - Boutique Care - Donner l'exemple pour garantir que l'équipe opère avec le plus haut niveau de soin et de respect pour le produit, évident dans chaque cérémonie ou procédure - Garantir que la vitrine attire les clients et maximise les ventes, conformément aux directives de l'entreprise - rechercher de manière proactive un soutien VM et MD en fonction des besoins du magasin - Fournir des commentaires et des suggestions lorsque nécessaire aux départements de Visual Merchandising et de Retail Merchandising ## Exigences - Au moins 8 ans d'expérience - Fortes compétences en résolution de problèmes et en organisation - Capacité à gérer de multiples priorités et à coordonner entre les fonctions - Excellentes compétences en communication et esprit d'équipe - Courant dans les deux langues, français et anglais ## Ce que nous offrons Rejoindre notre entreprise signifie travailler dans un environnement créatif et international, avec des équipes de personnes motivées par la curiosité et la quête de l'excellence. Le moteur de notre succès est l'importance et la valeur que nous accordons au talent et à la passion de nos employés, conduisant à leur propre croissance professionnelle. Le Groupe Prada promeut un environnement de travail inclusif, garantissant l'égalité des chances pour tous les candidats, quelle que soit leur sexe, leur origine ethnique, leur orientation sexuelle, leur handicap ou d'autres caractéristiques personnelles. Nous croyons que la diversité est une valeur et nous nous engageons à créer un lieu de travail équitable et respectueux pour tous. ## Contact

Prada Group promuove un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, garantendo pari opportunità per tutti i candidati, indipendentemente dal sesso, dall'etnia, dall'orientamento sessuale, dalla disabilità o da altre caratteristiche personali. Crediamo che la diversità sia un valore e ci impegniamo a costruire un posto di lavoro giusto e rispettoso per tutti. ## Contatto (senza informazioni di contatto fornite)

You convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world our brands. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team sales target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the client needs both in store and on ecommerce channel. RESPONSIBILITIES Act as a true brand ambassador, leveraging the human touch to create a welcoming and inspiring environment that drives client engagement and brings the brand’s values to life; Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and Inclusion values. Embrace leadership behaviors demonstrating a positive attitude and ability to work in team, showing adaptability to the needs of the business. Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Passion for building long-lasting relationships with clients and peers Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion Experience in a luxury or premium retail environment is a plus Being able to work in team, as well as alone Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluent spoken English expected Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.
